nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and advice partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or missing nuance
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me with brainstorming for ideas, expert advice for tricky situations

nodes.label: AI for drafting correspondence
nodes.grounding_span: helping me draft emails or phone call templates

nodes.label: Privacy and sensitivity of information
nodes.grounding_span: Some tasks involve particularly personal or sensitive information and I am mindful not to use AI for those tasks for privacy reasons

nodes.label: AI understanding of context and nuance
nodes.grounding_span: the AI model has missed some nuance of my particular situation

nodes.label: Quality of AI-generated writing
nodes.label_negative: Poor quality AI writing (wordy, terse, lacking warmth)
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes notice a lack of warmth, sometimes the product is particularly wordy and at other times it feels too terse

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to use the models to create lots of short, relatively simple correspondence which otherwise might be time consuming

nodes.label: AI as support for ADHD-related challenges
nodes.label_negative: Struggling with task initiation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have ADHD myself and sometimes I get 'tongue tied' when trying to phrase things. AI can help unblock that workflow

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of human-centered work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human roles
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that AI will help disability practitioners to be able to support their clients more comprehensively

nodes.label: Effective support for disabled individuals
nodes.grounding_span: supporting a disabled adult (with high functioning autism) as a mentor

nodes.label: Privacy and confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: I am mindful not to use AI for those tasks for privacy reasons

nodes.label: High-quality professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to me for my correspondence to be worded in a very high quality manner

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: means I have more time to spend on the more subtle, personal support tasks

nodes.label: Personal well-being and reduced cognitive load
nodes.grounding_span: avoids the 'blank page' panic on starting a task that can sometimes hold me back
